MVL 2.0 Sponsored Tools
Just a quick running list of tools that may be in best service to you (in our humble opinion) as you
move forward in your MVL journey:
1. ActiveCampaign ( link ) Plus or Higher Plan
If you elect to use ActiveCampaign, this will allow you most easily follow along on the technical
implementation videos, and built your very own mothership (with importable plug and play
automations.
(full disclosure: this is an affiliate link) :) If you do sign up for any of our tool suggestions - we
massively appreciate you and hope our importable automations really speed up your
implementation of these strategies :)
2. ThriveCart ( link ) One-Time Lifetime Deal
Hands down our favorite shopping cart for so many reasons. We wont' be covering shopping carts
in MVL, but felt compelled to mention this here, as it's such a joy to use, and it makes it quite easy to
tag your purchases as suggested in our MVL sales automation templates. This is what we used for
our own launch naturally.
I'll keep adding to the list as I see opportunities that are in best service to what's coming up on our
calls and in the Q&A, but for now, I'm going to keep it simple and just drop these two that I think
almost ANY online entrepreneur can benefit from adding to their toolkit.
With Appreciation,
Phil
